detailed_visual_description: This is a rectangular tote bag crafted from natural jute fiber, showcasing a coarse yet durable weave. The bag features sturdy, rounded handles made from braided jute, securely attached to the main body. Its edges are neatly reinforced with a darker, tightly woven jute trim, indicating careful craftsmanship. The overall color is a warm, earthy beige, highlighting the organic texture of the material.
conversation_context_summary: The artisan has submitted a picture of a newly finished jute bag and confirmed its visual quality. They are based in Bantwal, near the Mangaluru area, and wish to sell this specific piece for 300 rupees. The artisan seems ready to proceed with listing the product.
